headlines.title: US enforces naval blockade on Iran as nuclear issue takes center stage
Wall Street rallies to the edge of its all-time high as oil prices ease
Diplomats try to arrange second round of US-Iran talks during first full day of American blockade
Live Updates: Iran war continues with U.S. blockade of ports; Lebanon and Israel hold direct talks
Global Oil Markets Retrench as Diplomatic Hopes Flare Between Washington and Tehran

notes: US equity markets rallied on easing energy prices and optimism regarding a potential diplomatic resolution to the US-Iran conflict.
Brent crude fell sharply, dropping over 4% amid reports of resumed negotiations and a potential easing of the Strait of Hormuz blockade.
US 10-year Treasury yields pulled back from recent highs as the drop in crude oil prices relieved immediate inflation fears.
